title: ARM-0.5: A VLA with Open-World Generalization
summary: Our generalist policy extends across unseen homes and workspaces, enabling robots to transfer to novel tasks with minimal adaptation.
body: ARM-0.5 expands generalization to new layouts, tools, and visual conditions without task-specific retraining.
The training recipe balances multi-robot diversity with targeted robustness augmentation.
In cross-environment transfer tests, the model sustains high success rates on unseen task compositions.
figureAlt: ARM-0.5: A VLA with Open-World Generalization figure
